ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Client_delivery_request', ISPICKVAL(Type , 'Client Delivery'), ISPICKVAL( DataSolutionsSubtype__c, ""))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When the Type of WTP is 'Client Delivery' you must select a 'Data Solution Subtype'.
